purpose: Full calendar management for the account owner. View all events across any date range, check availability, find scheduling conflicts, look up attendees and meeting details, create events, update existing events, and manage RSVPs. Covers all calendar read and write operations the owner may request.

authorized_actions.expected_use: List calendar events by date range, attendee, keyword, or any criteria. Used for availability checks, schedule review, conflict detection, and meeting lookups.
Read full event details including attendees, location, description, and conferencing links. Used for meeting prep, attendee research, and context gathering.
Create calendar events when the owner instructs. Includes scheduling meetings, blocking focus time, and setting reminders.
Update existing events — reschedule, add attendees, change location, update descriptions.
